# Getting Started

This guide helps you get started with OpenDoc. Follow these steps carefully.

## Installation

Install OpenDoc with npm:

```bash
npm install opendoc
```

Or use bun:

```bash
bun add opendoc
```

## Configuration

Create an `opendoc.json` file in your project root. This file controls all settings.

> [!NOTE] Remember to restart the server after changing config.

> [!WARNING] Do not commit secrets to your config file.

## First Steps

1. Create a new folder for each page
2. Add an `index.md` file
3. Run `opendoc serve`

See also [[API Reference]] and [[Guides/Advanced|Advanced Guide]].
